title: Rapihin workspace tiap beberapa sesi
description: Recurring housekeeping: bersihin file scratch/temp, prune .build/.derivedData kalau membengkak, cek branch lama yang bisa dihapus, archive notes lama, review .beads/issues.jsonl drift. Cadence ~7 hari (mingguan).
notes:
Housekeeping run #2 selesai dikerjakan oleh Gemini.

**Hasil Housekeeping:**
1. **Pembersihan Git Worktrees:** Menghapus 9 git worktrees lokal yang sudah di-merge untuk merapikan folder `/Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/workstation-worktrees/`.
2. **Pembersihan Branch Lokal:** Menghapus 11 local branch agen yang sudah di-merge ke master.
3. **Pembersihan Branch Remote:** Menghapus branch agen yang sudah di-merge di remote repository (origin).
4. **Pembersihan Cache:** Menghapus folder cache `.build` (326MB) dan `.derivedData` (1.1GB) untuk membebaskan penyimpanan lokal (~1.4GB reclaimed).
5. **Riwayat Tugas Berulang (Recurring Task):** Menambahkan entri riwayat pengerjaan baru (run history) untuk `gemini` pada sidecar file `.beads/recurring/Workstation-tuj.json`.

**Lokasi Elemen di UI Aplikasi:**
Tugas ini adalah tugas berulang (recurring) yang tidak akan ditutup secara permanen menggunakan `bd close`. Anda dapat melihat isu `Workstation-tuj` ini pada:
- **Kanban Board Utama:** Isu ini berada di kolom Kanban Board utama (status `in_progress` dengan badge/label khusus tugas recurring).
- **Detail Issue Sheet:** Saat Anda membuka detail kartu isu `Workstation-tuj`, tab "Activity" atau detail riwayat akan menampilkan daftar run history yang tersimpan di sidecar `.beads/recurring/Workstation-tuj.json`.

**Panduan Pengujian Manual (Step-by-Step Testing Guide):**
1. Buka aplikasi **Workstation**.
2. Di **Kanban Board** utama atau sidebar, temukan kartu tugas **Workstation-tuj** yang berjudul **"Rapihin workspace tiap beberapa sesi"**.
3. Pastikan kartu tersebut memiliki penanda/badge recurring yang menandakan ia adalah tugas berulang (tugas rutin mingguan).
4. Klik kartu tersebut untuk memicu pembukaan detail sheet. Di bagian detail/riwayat pengerjaan, Anda dapat memverifikasi bahwa entri run history terbaru dari `gemini` telah terdaftar dan tersimpan dengan sukses.
5. Untuk pengujian di terminal, buka file `.beads/recurring/Workstation-tuj.json` dan pastikan entri riwayat dengan `"completedBy": "gemini"` dan timestamp terbaru telah ter-record.
6. Jalankan kembali `swift test` di workspace untuk memastikan seluruh sistem tetap stabil setelah pembersihan cache.

title: [bug] [Copilot] Auto-trust newly created git worktrees to prevent interactive trust prompts
description: When Beads creates a new git worktree for an agent run, the Antigravity CLI (agy) displays an interactive trust prompt asking if the user trusts the folder. This halts execution in the console/background and forces fallback to a default scratch directory. Automatically append the new worktree path to trustedWorkspaces in ~/.gemini/antigravity-cli/settings.json before launching the agent.
close_reason: Implemented trustWorktreeWorkspace helper in AppViewModel to automatically append newly created git worktree paths and standardized main workspace paths into trustedWorkspaces inside ~/.gemini/antigravity-cli/settings.json before launching the agent. This entirely bypasses the interactive folder trust confirmation prompt inside agy.

title: Fix terminal display bug when launching AI agents
description:
When launching an AI agent via 'Run Agent' or 'Run in Worktree', the terminal shows a broken command like 'cd && opencode run -m ...' instead of 'cd '/path' && opencode run ...'. The project path is missing from the cd command, and complex prompts with quotes are not properly escaped.

Root causes:
1. Path is empty or not passed correctly to TerminalLauncher when command is provided
2. Double-escaping: PromptGenerator escapes quotes for shell, then TerminalLauncher.escapeForAppleScript escapes them again for AppleScript, corrupting the command

Fix:
1. Ensure projectURL.path is always included in the cd command
2. Remove PromptGenerator shell escaping (keep raw prompt) and let TerminalLauncher handle escaping once for AppleScript
3. Add tests for complex prompts with nested quotes

Acceptance criteria:
- Terminal shows correct path: cd '/Users/.../Project' && opencode run ...
- Commands with quotes render correctly in Terminal.app
- All existing tests still pass
- Build succeeds
close_reason:
Menyelesaikan perbaikan bug peluncuran terminal untuk AI Agent (Workstation-gei).

Detail Perubahan:
1. Menambahkan penanganan kesalahan `osascript` yang kuat di `TerminalLauncher.swift` menggunakan `Pipe` standar error dan `waitUntilExit()`. Sekarang kesalahan dari AppleScript tidak lagi ditelan, melainkan dilaporkan secara transparan.
2. Memperbaiki fungsi `escapeForAppleScript` untuk melakukan escaping pada karakter backslash (`\`) terlebih dahulu sebelum double-quote (`"`), menyelesaikan kesalahan sintaksis `(-2741)` AppleScript secara tuntas.
3. Menambahkan kunci plist `NSAppleEventsUsageDescription` di target `project.yml` dan meluncurkan ulang Xcode project generation menggunakan xcodegen. Ini memastikan macOS akan meminta izin Automation pengguna alih-alih memblokir secara diam-diam.
4. Memperbaiki logika klaim isu di `AgentLaunchFlowCoordinator.swift` agar lebih toleran. Jika klaim gagal karena isu telah diklaim oleh agen yang bersangkutan, atau jika statusnya sudah diubah ke in_progress, peluncuran agen tidak akan terblokir dan terminal tetap dapat dibuka.

Lokasi Elemen Baru/Berubah di UI:
- Tombol 'Run Agent' atau 'Run in Worktree' pada Panel Detail Isu (bagian kanan Kanban board).
- Panel Konsol/Activity Log yang menunjukkan log aktivitas peluncuran agen.

Panduan Uji Coba Manual Langkah demi Langkah:
1. Pastikan database Beads prime aktif.
2. Buka aplikasi Workstation.
3. Pilih salah satu isu pada kolom Kanban (misalnya 'Workstation-gei').
4. Pada panel sebelah kanan, pilih Agent (misalnya 'Gemini Code Executor' atau 'Claude Code Executor').
5. Klik tombol 'Run Agent' atau 'Run in Worktree'.
6. Sistem akan memicu popup sistem macOS meminta izin Automation untuk mengendalikan Terminal.app jika dijalankan untuk pertama kali. Setujui permintaan tersebut.
7. Terminal window baru akan berhasil terbuka, masuk ke path direktori kerja proyek (cd '/path/ke/proyek'), dan menjalankan perintah eksekusi kode agen secara lancar tanpa korupsi tanda kutip atau backslash.

title: Fix CloseIssueSheet styling in Light Mode
description: Currently, when the Workstation app is in light/white mode, the Close Issue form/sheet remains in dark mode. We need to ensure that the sheet dynamically inherits or applies the active color scheme (light/dark) properly, including its background, text editors, labels, and borders.
notes: fixed CloseIssueSheet and BulkCloseSheet light/dark mode color scheme transition by dynamically inheriting colorScheme

title: FSEvents file watcher: auto-detect issues.jsonl changes
description: Ganti polling manual dengan FSEvents/DispatchSource untuk watch .beads/issues.jsonl secara real-time. Saat file berubah (ditulis oleh bd CLI atau agent), app otomatis reload issues tanpa perlu user klik ⌘R. Implementasi: buat BeadsFileWatcher service menggunakan DispatchSource.makeFileSystemObjectSource — watch directory .beads/ untuk event .write. Debounce 300ms supaya tidak flood reload saat bd menulis multiple kali dalam satu operasi. Integrate ke IssueStore: replace/supplement polling dengan watcher. Side effect positif: semua fitur yang depend on fresh data (Smart Notifications, Focus Mode reminder, board view) otomatis benefit tanpa perubahan tambahan. Ini blocker untuk Smart Notifications.

title: Smart Notifications: status change & agent completion awareness
description: Implementasi macOS native notifications (UNUserNotificationCenter) untuk membuat user aware terhadap perubahan penting tanpa harus aktif melihat app. Event yang trigger notifikasi: (1) Agent selesai running — 'Agent finished: Workstation-xxx moved to Review' dengan action button 'Open Issue'. (2) Issue berpindah status — khususnya ke In Review (butuh perhatian user) atau Done (bisa celebrate). (3) Blocked issue ter-unblock — 'Workstation-xxx is now unblocked, ready to work'. (4) Focus session reminder — 90 menit tanpa pause (dari Focus Mode). Implementasi: minta permission UNUserNotificationCenter saat pertama kali user enable. Notifikasi harus actionable — tap notifikasi buka app + navigate ke issue yang relevan. Settings panel untuk toggle masing-masing jenis notifikasi on/off. Hindari notification spam — cooldown 30 detik per issue untuk status changes.
notes:
Implementasi selesai. Build & 273 tests hijau.

FILES:
- Sources/BeadsContract/SmartNotificationSettings.swift — struct settings (Codable, Equatable, Sendable) dengan 4 toggle: agentCompletion, statusChange, unblocked, focusReminder. Cooldown default 30s, focus reminder default 90 menit.
- Sources/BeadsWorkspace/SmartNotificationManager.swift — @MainActor @Observable service. Permission via UNUserNotificationCenter.requestAuthorization. Status-diff detection dengan snapshot sebelum reload + compare setelah reload. Cooldown per-issue dengan lastNotificationTimes dict. Focus reminder sent once per session (focusReminderSentForID set).
- App/NotificationSettingsView.swift — sheet 380×480 dengan permission indicator (dot hijau/orange), 4 toggle rows, cooldown picker (15/30/60/120s).
- Sources/BeadsWorkspace/AppPreferences.swift — field 'notifications: SmartNotificationSettings' dengan backwards-compat decodeIfPresent.
- App/AppViewModel.swift — initNotificationManager() on first workspace sync, snapshotBeforeReload() + detectStatusChanges() setiap reloadIssues(), triggerFocusReminderIfNeeded() di tickFocusTimer(), sendAgentCompletionNotification() di updateAgentRunStatus saat .needsReview.
- App/BoardSidebarView.swift — Notifications button (bell icon).
- App/BoardView.swift — .sheet(isPresented: $appVM.isNotificationSettingsPresented) → NotificationSettingsView.

CATATAN: Blocker Workstation-1pc (FSEvents file watcher) masih in_progress dengan label human. Smart Notifications sudah bisa bekerja karena detection dilakukan di reloadIssues() yang dipanggil file watcher — ketika Workstation-1pc selesai, notifikasi otomatis lebih responsif tanpa perubahan tambahan.

title: Focus Mode: persistent focus strip + session time tracking
description: Tambah 'Focus Mode' sebagai fitur first-class di Workstation. Terdiri dari tiga bagian: (1) FocusSession model — struct/class baru yang menyimpan issueID, startTime, pausedDuration, dan array of SessionInterval. Persist ke UserDefaults atau file sidecar supaya survive app restart. (2) Persistent focus strip di StatusBarView — saat issue di-focus, strip menampilkan: status dot, issue ID + judul (truncated), elapsed timer yang update tiap detik, tombol Pause/Resume, dan tombol unfocus (✕). Strip ini selalu visible di semua view selama ada active focus session. (3) Session log di IssueDetailView — section baru 'Time Spent' yang menampilkan total waktu kumulatif dari semua session untuk issue itu, breakdown per session (tanggal, durasi). (4) Trigger focus: klik 'Focus' button di issue card atau detail pane, atau otomatis saat issue di-claim. (5) Gentle reminder notification setelah 90 menit tanpa pause — 'Sudah 90 menit di issue ini, mau istirahat?'

title: Command Palette: global ⌘K search & action hub
description: Implementasi command palette global yang bisa dibuka dari mana saja dengan ⌘K (atau ⌘Shift+K supaya tidak konflik dengan Copilot yang sudah dihapus). Palette adalah floating sheet dengan fuzzy search input yang mencakup: (1) Issue search — ketik judul/ID, langsung navigate ke issue atau select di board. (2) Actions — 'Move to In Progress', 'Claim', 'Close', 'New Issue', 'Reload' — semua aksi board yang biasanya butuh klik. (3) Status filter shortcuts — 'Show only Blocked', 'Show In Progress', dll. (4) Recent issues — tanpa ketik apapun, langsung tampil 5 issue terakhir yang dibuka. UI: dark/light adaptive, rounded sheet di tengah layar, keyboard-navigable (arrow keys + Enter), dismiss dengan Escape. Tidak perlu mouse sama sekali.
notes: Implemented Command Palette (⌘⇧K) with fuzzy search. Features: (1) Issue search — fuzzy match by title/ID, select to navigate. (2) 3 quick actions — Reload, New Issue, Debug Panel. (3) 3 filter shortcuts — Human Review, Blocked, Clear Filters. (4) Recent issues shown by default (top 5 by updatedAt). (5) Keyboard navigation (↑↓, Enter, Escape). (6) Dark Craftboard style sheet centered with shadow. Also added statuses filter to FilterState for future extension. BUILD SUCCEEDED, 273/273 tests green.

title: Quick Capture: instant issue creation from anywhere
description: Floating input untuk bikin issue instant tanpa interrupt flow. Trigger: ⌘Shift+N dari mana saja di dalam app. UI: small popover atau bottom sheet — satu text field untuk judul, optional type selector (Task/Bug/Feature via Tab key), langsung submit dengan Enter. Issue masuk ke Backlog dengan priority default. Tidak perlu buka CreateIssueSheet yang full — itu tetap ada untuk pengisian lengkap. Fitur tambahan: (1) Jika ada teks di clipboard saat dibuka, pre-fill judul dari clipboard. (2) Setelah submit, tampilkan toast kecil 'Issue created: Workstation-xxx' dengan link untuk open detail kalau mau lengkapin. (3) Keyboard shortcut yang bisa dikonfigurasi di settings.
notes: Implemented Quick Capture (⌘⇧N) with: (1) Instant floating sheet triggered by ⌘⇧N. (2) Title input with clipboard pre-fill on open. (3) Type selector cycling Task→Bug→Feature→Epic→Chore via Tab key. (4) P2 priority default. (5) Issue created with bd, ID shown in toast. (6) Toast with issue link to navigate directly. (7) Auto-dismiss toast after 4s. BUILD SUCCEEDED, 273/273 tests green.

title: WorkspaceDetailView: shell & tab navigation
description: Buat fondasi view baru 'Workspace Detail' yang menjadi container untuk semua tab statistik workspace. View ini perlu: (1) header dengan nama workspace + health badge + action buttons, (2) inner tab bar (Overview, Issues, Team, Activity) dengan underline indicator seperti di referensi, (3) body yang swap konten per tab, (4) entry point dari sidebar atau toolbar. Ini blocker untuk semua tab detail lainnya.

title: Light Mode: design token & color system setup
description: Sebelum menerapkan light mode ke tiap view, perlu ada fondasi sistem warna yang mendukung dua mode (light/dark). Saat ini semua warna di-hardcode di WorkstationTheme sebagai dark-only. Tujuan issue ini: audit semua color token di WorkstationTheme, ganti ke adaptive Color (menggunakan colorScheme-aware atau NSColor system colors), dan pastikan accent/gold tetap konsisten di kedua mode. Ini blocker untuk semua issue light mode lainnya.
notes: Adaptive color system selesai. Semua token WorkstationTheme sekarang resolve otomatis via NSColor dynamicProvider. Light mode palette diambil dari Craftboard React reference. Token baru ditambah: hover, active, inputBg, greenBg, greenBorder — siap dipakai oleh 6 issue view berikutnya. Build + 273 tests hijau.

title: Bulk actions: restore IssueStore selection APIs for BulkActionPanel
description:
BulkActionPanel no longer compiles because it expects selection APIs on IssueStore that are missing in the current tree.

Observed failures while building the worktree used for Local AI testing:
- IssueStore has no member selectedIssues
- IssueStore has no member toggleSelection
- IssueStore has no member selectedIssueIDs

This blocks app builds in the worktree and makes it hard to validate unrelated features. The fix should restore the selection contract or refactor the bulk action panel to use the current store API without breaking existing multi-select UX.

What needs to be done:
- Inspect the intended IssueStore selection model.
- Restore or replace the missing selection methods used by BulkActionPanel.
- Keep bulk action behavior consistent with the existing UI.
- Make sure the app builds again in the worktree.

Acceptance criteria:
- BulkActionPanel compiles again.
- IssueStore exposes the selection behavior expected by bulk actions, or BulkActionPanel is updated to the new API.
- App build succeeds in the worktree.
- Existing bulk selection UX still works.
acceptance_criteria:
- BulkActionPanel compiles again.
- IssueStore exposes the selection behavior expected by bulk actions, or BulkActionPanel is updated to the new API.
- App build succeeds in the worktree.
- Existing bulk selection UX still works.
notes:
Fixed. Root cause: BulkActionPanel was committed in cfdc302 expecting IssueStore selection APIs (selectedIssues, toggleSelection, selectedIssueIDs, hasMultiSelection) that never landed alongside it. Additionally DetailPaneMode.bulkAction was added to AppViewModel without IssueRightPane updating its switch, also breaking build.

Two commits on master:
- ce68038 fix: restore IssueStore selection APIs for BulkActionPanel (selectedIssueIDs, rangeAnchorID, toggleSelection, selectRange, selectedIssues, hasMultiSelection; selectIssue/clearSelection maintain multi-state; performReload prunes stale ids)
- 80d33e1 fix: handle bulkAction case in IssueRightPane (routes to BulkActionPanel; skip auto-reset to .issue while multi-selection active)

Verified: swift build ok, swift test 261/261 green, xcodebuild Debug succeeded. Also overlaid both files into worktree workstation-workstation-6tq and confirmed its app build succeeds. 6tq backups restored — its own working tree untouched. Bulk selection UX preserved (cmd-click toggle, shift-click range, esc clear, BulkActionPanel right-pane with Claim All / Mark Human Review / Close All / Clear).

title: Worktree Launch: preflight and recovery states
description:
Add explicit launch preflight and recovery states for worktree-based agent runs.

Why this exists:
Worktree runs need clearer feedback when setup, dirty-tree, or branch conflicts block launch.

What needs to be done:
- Detect and surface missing setup, dirty tree, existing worktree, and branch conflict states.
- Show a clear recovery path before launching Terminal.
- Keep launch routed through the existing safe launcher.
- Make the blocked state actionable instead of a dead end.

Acceptance criteria:
- User can see why a worktree launch is blocked.
- User can retry validation or choose a recovery action.
- Successful launch still goes through the safe terminal path.
- No silent shell execution is added.
notes: Added worktree launch preflight in GitWorktreeService and AppViewModel. Launch now pauses on setup, dirty-tree confirmation, existing worktree, or branch conflict states and shows the recovery sheet. Successful launch still uses the safe terminal launcher. Added service coverage for clean, dirty, setup-missing, and conflict preflight cases.

title: Assignee handoff: combine assign and launch for AI executors
description:
Summary
Simplify the assignee UX so choosing an AI executor becomes the main handoff action. When the user picks Claude, Codex, or another AI executor, the app should claim the issue and open the agent in a worktree automatically. Human assignees stay assignment-only.

Key changes
- Make AI executor assignee selection trigger a combined assign + run flow.
- Support the same behavior from all existing entry points, including issue card right-click menus, issue detail menus, and any assignee picker UI.
- Keep the visual assignee badges/icons unchanged.
- Keep worktree launch as the default path for AI executors.
- Preserve the manual/advanced launch path only as a secondary fallback, not the main flow.
- Keep Beads mutations explicit through `bd`, and terminal launch through the existing safe launcher.

Acceptance criteria
- Selecting Claude or Codex from assignee UI claims the issue and opens the agent terminal in a worktree.
- Right-click menus expose the same combined action as direct selection.
- Selecting a human assignee updates metadata only and does not launch Terminal.
- Existing prompt copy, agent run history, and console behavior still work.
- Existing dirty/worktree safety rules still apply.
- Assignee visuals stay the same.

Implementation notes
- Reuse the existing selected-agent and worktree launch plumbing where possible.
- Keep the new flow simple enough that the user does not need to think in two separate steps: assign, then run.
close_reason: Combined assign+launch wired in IssueCardView context menu and IssueDetailView assignee picker. AgentProfileStore.executorProfile resolver routes claude/codex/other to canonical executor profile; AppViewModel.assignAndLaunchIfExecutor reuses launchAgentInWorktree (auto-claims). Humans/empty fall through to plain assignee update. 264 tests hijau; ./run-app build sukses.

title: Worktree launch: allow dirty source trees
description: Worktree creation should not be blocked by uncommitted changes in the source workspace. Parallel agent runs need isolated worktrees even when the main tree is dirty. Keep the warning visible if needed, but let the worktree be created from the current checkout state.
notes: Worktree creation no longer blocks on a dirty source tree. GitWorktreeService now skips the source-tree dirty preflight and can create isolated worktrees while the main checkout remains modified.
close_reason: Worktree launches now proceed even when the source tree is dirty, so parallel worktree runs are no longer blocked by unrelated local changes.

title: Auto Plan: prepare AgentRunRecords for assigned batch issues
description:
Create AgentRunRecords for each assigned issue in a batch.

Each run should include issue metadata, assigned agent, command, generated prompt, project path, optional worktree path, and status.
design:
- Reuse Agent Run History models where possible.
- Generate executor prompts per issue.
- Store a prepared or queued state before launch.
- Surface runs in history and batch views.
acceptance_criteria:
- User can prepare runs for all assigned batch issues.
- Each run has the correct issue ID and title.
- Each run has an assigned agent and command.
- Each run has a generated prompt.
- Runs persist after app restart.
- Runs can be opened in Agent Run Console.
- No terminal is launched automatically in this issue.
notes: This should stop at preparation so launch modes can be layered on next.

title: Auto Plan: discover newly created or updated issues after spec run
description:
After the spec agent creates or refines issues, the app should reload Beads and help the user identify which issues belong to the batch.

The app must not assume every new or updated issue is part of the batch.
design:
- Run bd list --json and bd ready --json after the planning step.
- Show likely new or updated issues without auto-selecting them.
- Persist a local BatchAgentPlan with issue plans and status.
- Keep selection separate from Beads mutation.
acceptance_criteria:
- User can reload issues after a spec run.
- App shows candidate issues for the batch.
- User can select which issues belong to the batch.
- App stores a local BatchAgentPlan.
- Batch plan persists after app restart.
- Existing issue loading still works.
notes: This is the discovery step that turns a plan run into a batch candidate list.

title: Auto Plan: assign executor agents to batch issues
description:
Allow each issue in a batch to be assigned to an executor agent profile.

This is app-local agent assignment metadata and should not be confused with Beads assignee or claim.
design:
- Add batch assignment UI.
- Show whether each profile can execute code.
- Allow a default executor plus per-issue overrides.
- Persist the mapping in batch plan state.
acceptance_criteria:
- User can assign a default executor for all batch issues.
- User can override the executor per issue.
- App prevents or warns when the selected profile cannot execute code.
- Assignments persist locally.
- Assignments do not modify Beads assignee.
notes: Executor assignment should stay local and separate from Beads ownership.

title: Auto Plan: create batch planning request UI
description:
Add a UI where the user can enter a high-level request and ask a spec agent to create or refine multiple Beads issues.

The UI should generate a spec prompt that instructs the agent to use Beads commands, not source edits, to shape the plan.
design:
- Add a Batch Planning Request screen or modal.
- Reuse the existing spec-writer style prompt generation path.
- Keep issue creation explicit and Beads-backed.
- Do not auto-run the prompt in the app itself.
acceptance_criteria:
- User can enter a high-level planning request.
- User can select a spec agent profile.
- App generates a batch planning prompt.
- Prompt instructs the spec agent to create or refine Beads issues.
- Prompt instructs the spec agent not to modify source code.
- User can copy the prompt.
- User can open terminal for the selected spec agent.
- No issues are created automatically unless the user explicitly triggers an existing BeadsService action.
notes: This is the entry point for planning, not the actual issue creation step.

title: AI Issue Detailer: turn rough ideas into structured issue drafts
description:
Add an AI-powered issue detailing flow in New Issue.

The user can enter a rough idea, then Local AI generates a structured issue draft with title, description, implementation notes, acceptance criteria, issue type, priority, labels, and split or dependency suggestions if useful.
design:
- Add an IssueDraft model if needed.
- Add AI Detail mode to the New Issue flow.
- Call LocalAIService with detailIssueFromRoughIdea.
- Show the result in the AI Suggestion Preview or a dedicated draft editor.
- Keep the final creation step explicit and Beads-backed.
acceptance_criteria:
- User can open New Issue and choose AI Detail mode.
- User can enter a rough idea.
- App generates a structured issue draft.
- Draft shows title, description, implementation notes, acceptance criteria, type, priority, and labels.
- User can edit the draft before creation.
- User can regenerate.
- User can cancel.
- User can create the issue from the draft.
- Issue creation uses bd create.
- App does not mutate Beads without confirmation.
- App handles Ollama unavailable errors gracefully.
- App handles unparseable AI output gracefully.
notes: Implemented AI Issue Detailer for New Issue. Added IssueDraft parsing/mapping, extended bd create plumbing for design notes and labels, added LocalAIAction.detailIssueFromRoughIdea, and refactored the create sheet to support Manual and AI Detail modes with editable draft fields, regeneration, and soft error handling. Validation: swift test; xcodebuild -project BeadsKanbanApp.xcodeproj -scheme BeadsKanbanApp -configuration Debug build.

title: AI Suggestion Preview: review local AI output before applying
description:
Add a preview UI for all local AI suggestions.

Local AI output must never be applied silently. The user must be able to review, edit, copy, regenerate, apply, or cancel.
design:
- Add a reusable AI suggestion preview modal or sheet.
- Show generated output in a readable editor.
- Provide Copy, Apply, Regenerate, and Cancel actions.
- Require explicit user confirmation for any apply action.
acceptance_criteria:
- Local AI output appears in a preview UI.
- User can copy generated output.
- User can edit generated output before applying.
- User can cancel without side effects.
- User must explicitly click Apply before the app mutates anything.
- Preview UI works even if output is plain text.
- App does not crash on long output.
notes: Added a reusable local AI suggestion preview flow with an editable sheet, copy/regenerate/apply/cancel actions, and a concrete close-issue AI draft path that previews Ollama output before it is applied to the close reason draft. Wired the new preview state and sheet into the app target, and kept the actual Beads mutation behind the existing Close Issue confirmation. Validation: swift test, xcodebuild -project BeadsKanbanApp.xcodeproj -scheme BeadsKanbanApp -configuration Debug build.

title: Local AI Service: add Ollama request layer and action router
description:
Add the local AI service layer that talks to Ollama and routes app actions to local AI prompts.

The service should use non-streaming requests first and return text responses that the app can preview before applying.
design:
- Add LocalAIProviding protocol.
- Add OllamaService.
- Use the Ollama HTTP API with /api/generate and stream: false.
- Add LocalAIAction cases for issue drafting, backlog analysis, prompt optimization, close reasons, and run summaries.
- Route actions through LocalAIService and choose fast or strong models per task.
acceptance_criteria:
- App can call OllamaService with a prompt.
- App can receive a text response.
- App handles request failures cleanly.
- LocalAIAction exists.
- LocalAIService can build prompts for supported actions.
- No source-code execution is added.
- No Beads mutation happens automatically.
notes: Added the local AI transport and routing layer for Ollama-backed actions. New LocalAIAction cases build prompts for issue drafting, backlog analysis, prompt optimization, close reasons, and run summaries. LocalAIService selects fast vs strong models, validates settings, and delegates to a new OllamaService request layer that posts non-streaming /api/generate requests and returns the response text. Added focused tests for prompt routing, request encoding, success, and failure paths. Verified with swift test and xcodebuild -project BeadsKanbanApp.xcodeproj -scheme BeadsKanbanApp -configuration Debug build.

title: Local AI Settings: configure Ollama provider and models
description:
Add app settings for enabling local AI assistance through Ollama.

The user should be able to configure:
- enable or disable Local AI
- provider
- base URL
- fast model
- strong model
- test connection

Default settings:
- provider: Ollama
- base URL: http://localhost:11434
- fast model: qwen2.5-coder:3b
- strong model: qwen2.5-coder:7b
design:
- Add LocalAISettings model.
- Add LocalAIProvider enum.
- Persist settings locally.
- Add a settings UI section.
- Add a test connection button that checks Ollama reachability.
- Show friendly errors when Ollama is not running.
acceptance_criteria:
- User can enable or disable Local AI.
- User can configure Ollama base URL.
- User can configure the fast model.
- User can configure the strong model.
- User can test connection to Ollama.
- Settings persist after app restart.
- App shows a clear error if Ollama is unavailable.
- Existing Beads workflow still works.
notes: Implemented persisted Local AI settings for Ollama: added LocalAISettings and LocalAIProvider, default Ollama values, Ollama reachability tester against /api/tags, welcome-screen settings card, sidebar entry, and test coverage for persistence and connection behavior. Build and focused tests pass.

title: Add Launch Setup action for missing Beads worktrees
description: When a selected project or worktree is missing Beads setup, the app should offer a user-triggered Launch Setup action instead of leaving the user at a dead end. The setup flow should use the existing workspace validation/setup-hint model, open the safe terminal launcher with the relevant command hints (bd init, bd setup claude, brew install beads), and then let the user re-validate the workspace. This should work for any project, not just the current repo.
close_reason: Added Launch Setup action in WelcomeView, wired it to the safe terminal launcher, and reused workspace setup hints for generic Beads bootstrap.

title: Ignore Beads export noise in worktree runs
description: Worktree preflight should not treat passive Beads export noise as a blocking git dirty state. When bd writes .beads/issues.jsonl or related export files, creating or launching an agent run in a worktree should still succeed as long as there are no real source or project file changes. Keep the existing bd-only mutation rule and preserve issue file watching/reload behavior.
close_reason: Implemented worktree preflight filtering for passive Beads export noise while keeping real dirty files blocking; tests pass.

title: Agent Run Console v1: local prompt and run control panel
description: Add an Agent Run Console panel/drawer for the selected AgentRunRecord. This is the local/simple version of an agent console. It should not run or stream the AI agent inside the app yet. The goal is to make each vibe coding session easier to control by showing selected issue, selected agent, generated prompt, run status, project path or worktree path, terminal command, quick actions for copying prompt and opening terminal, local notes, and next-step actions like mark needs review or accepted. This version should be purely local UI + stored AgentRunRecord data. It should not embed Claude/Codex. It should not stream terminal output. It should not require a pseudo-terminal. Suggested component names: AgentRunConsoleView, AgentRunHeaderView, AgentRunPromptPreviewView, AgentRunActionsView, AgentRunNotesView. Suggested UI layout: right-side drawer or detail panel. Header: issue ID, issue title, agent name, status badge, project/worktree path. Prompt section: generated prompt preview, copy prompt button, optional edit-before-copy textarea if already supported. Actions: Open Terminal, Copy Command, Mark Needs Review, Mark Accepted, Mark Failed, Mark Abandoned. Notes: local notes textarea, save notes to AgentRunRecord. Implementation notes: Reuse existing AgentRunHistory and AgentRunRecord model. If AgentRunRecord does not yet store notes, ensure notes can be persisted. When a run is created from Implement with Selected Agent, automatically open/show the Agent Run Console for that run. The console should work for both Claude Code Executor and Codex Code Executor. If the run uses a worktree, show the worktree path. If the run uses the main project folder, show the project path. The console should be read/write only for app-local metadata such as run status and notes. Do not mutate Beads issue status automatically from this console, except through existing explicit user actions if already available. Do not close Beads issues automatically. Do not run custom arbitrary shell commands silently.
acceptance_criteria: User can open an Agent Run Console for an existing AgentRunRecord. Creating a new agent run opens the console automatically. Console shows issue ID and issue title. Console shows selected agent name and command. Console shows run status. Console shows project path or worktree path. Console shows the generated prompt. User can copy the prompt again. User can open Terminal from the console using existing safe terminal launcher rules. User can update run status manually: needsReview, accepted, failed, abandoned. User can add/edit local notes for the run. Notes persist after app restart. Console works for Claude Code Executor runs. Console works for Codex Code Executor runs. No embedded AI API is added. No live terminal streaming is added. No .beads files are edited directly.
notes:
Implemented Agent Run Console v1.

Changes:
- New AgentRunConsoleView (App/AgentRunConsoleView.swift) with sub-views: AgentRunHeaderView, AgentRunPromptPreviewView, AgentRunActionsView, AgentRunNotesView. Shows issue ID/title, agent name, status badge, project/worktree path, generated prompt, terminal command, status-action buttons (needsReview/accepted/failed/abandoned), and a notes editor with Save/Revert.
- AgentRunHistoryStore: added updateNotes(id:notes:), record(id:), latestRecord(forIssueID:). Notes-only updates preserve status and completedAt; whitespace-only notes are normalized to nil.
- AppViewModel: added activeConsoleRunID state, presentAgentRunConsole / presentLatestAgentRunConsole / dismissAgentRunConsole, updateAgentRunStatus, updateAgentRunNotes, and openTerminalForAgentRun (reuses existing TerminalLauncher). Launches via performAgentLaunch and beginWorktreeAgentLaunch now set activeConsoleRunID so the console opens automatically after Implement with Selected Agent / Run in Worktree.
- BoardView: presents the console as a sheet bound to activeConsoleRunID; only opens when a record exists.
- IssueDetailView: 'Run Console' button appears when the issue has at least one recorded run, opening the latest run.
- Tests: new AgentRunHistoryStoreTests for updateNotes and lookups. Full suite (219 tests) passes; xcodebuild app build also succeeds.

No embedded Claude/Codex API, no live streaming, no .beads file mutations. Status changes only affect the local AgentRunRecord.

title: Right-click context menu di card kanban & list
description:
Why: Action paling sering (claim, flag review, close, copy prompt) saat ini cuma ada di detail panel. Power user harus buka panel dulu sebelum bisa act. Context menu = 1 right-click + 1 pilih = 2 klik total, no panel needed.

What:
- Tambah .contextMenu modifier di IssueCardView (kanban) dan IssueListView row.
- Menu items: Claim (kalau status=open), Flag for Review (kalau status=in_progress), Close..., Copy Prompt, Copy Agent Command, Add Blocker..., Change Priority > submenu P0-P4, Change Assignee > submenu claude/codex/other/me.
- Item disabled kontekstual (Flag for Review tidak muncul untuk open/closed).
- Reuse AppViewModel.copyPrompt, presentCloseSheet, store.claim/requestHumanReview yang sudah ada.

Out of scope:
- Multi-select context menu (separate issue kalau perlu).
- Keyboard accelerator di menu item (terikat ke keyboard nav issue terpisah).
acceptance_criteria: (1) Right-click card open → menu muncul dengan minimal 5 item context-aware. (2) Klik 'Claim' → status berubah ke in_progress, kanban refresh. (3) Klik 'Close...' → buka existing CloseIssueSheet. (4) Item 'Flag for Review' hilang dari menu kalau status bukan in_progress. (5) Test IssueStore mutation paths sudah covered di baseline.
notes:
Implemented shared macOS context menus for issue cards and list rows.

Changes:
- Added reusable issue context menu actions for Claim, Flag for Review, Close..., Copy Prompt, Copy Agent Command, Add Blocker..., priority submenu, and assignee submenu.
- Centralized close and blocker sheet presentation in AppViewModel/BoardView so context-menu actions work from board surfaces.
- Added assignee support to UpdateIssueInput and BeadsService.updateIssue via --assignee.
- Kept selection, drag, reload, and detail-panel actions intact.

Verification:
- swift test
- xcodebuild -project BeadsKanbanApp.xcodeproj -scheme BeadsKanbanApp -configuration Debug build

title: Drag-and-drop card antar kolom kanban
description:
Why: Transisi status (claim, flag review, close) saat ini tersembunyi di menu/sheet — butuh 2-3 klik. Drag-drop adalah gesture paling natural di kanban dan satu klik-drag bisa replace seluruh flow context menu untuk perpindahan kolom.

What:
- Drag card dari Ready ke In Progress → trigger 'bd update --claim'.
- Drag card dari In Progress ke Review → trigger 'bd update --add-label human'.
- Drag card ke Done → buka CloseIssueSheet (require reason).
- Drag ke Blocked → noop atau toast 'add blocker via picker' (Blocked column read-only secara semantik).
- Pakai SwiftUI .onDrag/.dropDestination di KanbanBoardView.swift.
- Drop tidak boleh trigger select/open-detail (state guard).
- Visual feedback: card semi-transparent saat di-drag, target column highlight border gold.

Out of scope:
- Drag-drop reorder dalam kolom yang sama (bd tidak punya konsep order).
- Drag dari/ke List view.
acceptance_criteria: (1) Drag card dari Ready ke In Progress otomatis claim+assignee=user. (2) Drop ke Done buka close sheet, cancel batal mutate. (3) Drop ke kolom sama-status = noop tanpa error. (4) Test KanbanBoardViewTests untuk drop handler logic. (5) Visual: card opacity drop ~0.5 saat drag, target border gold.
notes:
Implemented drag-and-drop antar kolom kanban.

Files:
- NEW Sources/BeadsContract/KanbanDropResolver.swift — pure resolver (KanbanDropAction enum + action(from:to:) function)
- NEW Tests/BeadsContractTests/KanbanDropResolverTests.swift — 12 cases covering full drop matrix
- App/KanbanBoardView.swift — .draggable(issue.id) per card dengan preview opacity 0.7; .dropDestination per kolom dengan hoverTargetColumn state + gold border overlay (2px, animasi 0.12s); handleDrop dispatches ke store mutations
- App/BoardView.swift — pass onRequestClose closure ke KanbanBoardView (presents CloseIssueSheet via appVM)

Drop matrix yang aktif:
- Ready/Backlog → InProgress = store.claim()
- InProgress → Review = store.requestHumanReview() (add label human)
- InProgress/Review → Done = onRequestClose() → CloseIssueSheet
- Sisanya noop (Done→x, Blocked→x, Ready→Done, dst)

Verifikasi:
- swift test: 183/183 hijau (baseline 170 → 183, +12 cases baru + +1 yang sudah ada di baseline)
- swift build: clean
- xcodegen generate: success (file baru ter-register)
- ./run-app build: BUILD SUCCEEDED

Manual smoke pending — please verify 5 path di plan: Ready→InProgress (claim), InProgress→Review (label human), InProgress→Done (sheet muncul, cancel = no mutation), Done→InProgress (noop), Ready→Done (noop). Visual: drag preview opacity 0.7, target column gold border saat hover. Click biasa tetap select card.

Out of scope (per plan): reverse transitions (butuh removeLabel service yg belum ada), reorder dalam kolom (bd tidak punya order), drag kanban↔list, toast saat noop.

title: [UI] Align issue detail status and Copilot context with the Review column when human label is present
description:
Why: Currently, when an issue is moved to the 'Review' column (by adding the 'human' label), its status in the right pane details and top breadcrumb still says 'in_progress'. This makes it inconsistent with the column, and the Copilot AI is also unaware that the issue is in the 'Review' state instead of 'in_progress'.

What:
- In IssueDetailView.swift, if the issue has the 'human' label, display its status as 'review' and color it with the Blue theme (matching the Review column color).
- In LocalAIAction.swift, update the rendered status of issues passed to the Copilot prompt context so that 'in_progress' issues with the 'human' label are described as 'review'.
notes:
[Lokasi UI]
1. Panel Detail Issue (Issue Detail Panel di laci sebelah kanan): Bagian breadcrumb header atas ('Issue / review') dan properti 'STATUS' sekarang menyelaraskan nilainya menjadi 'review' dengan ikon lingkaran berwarna biru (sebelumnya 'in_progress' berwarna emas).
2. Konteks Obrolan Copilot AI: Informasi status yang dikirimkan ke model AI untuk issue berlabel 'human' kini secara konsisten bernilai 'review'.

[Panduan Pengujian Manual]
1. Jalankan aplikasi Workstation.
2. Klik salah satu card issue di kolom 'REVIEW' pada papan kanban (misalnya Workstation-u25y atau Workstation-tb4) untuk membuka detail panel sebelah kanan.
3. Amati area atas detail panel: teks status yang sebelumnya tertulis 'in_progress' (warna emas) kini berubah menjadi 'review' (warna biru).
4. Amati baris properti 'STATUS' di bawah judul: ikon titik lingkaran kini berwarna biru dengan teks 'review'.
5. Buka panel obrolan Copilot AI (Cmd+K) dan tanyakan status issue tersebut (misal: 'Apa status dari Workstation-u25y?'). AI sekarang akan secara akurat menjawab bahwa statusnya adalah 'review'.

title: [UI] Support H2 Header (##) rendering in Copilot chat bubbles
description:
**Context**
The AI assistant in Copilot frequently uses '##' for subheadings to structure its responses. However, currently it displays as raw text (e.g., '## Title') because MarkdownTextRenderer uses inlineOnlyPreservingWhitespace for .copilot mode, which ignores block headings.

**Goal**
Enable proper rendering of '##' headings in Copilot chat bubbles so they appear as stylized subheadings (e.g., bold, slightly larger font, on their own line with spacing) instead of showing the raw '##' prefix.

**Proposed Changes**
- Update MarkdownTextRenderer.swift to detect lines starting with '##'.
- Style them appropriately in the Copilot chat view (e.g., in applyCopilotStyling or by parsing them into custom styled text/view blocks).
notes:
[Lokasi UI]
Tampilan chat bubble di dalam panel kanan obrolan Copilot (diaktifkan lewat tombol bintang 'Copilot' di kanan atas atau Cmd+K).

[Panduan Pengujian Manual]
1. Jalankan aplikasi Workstation.
2. Buka panel kanan Copilot lewat tombol berikon bintang ('Copilot') di pojok kanan atas atau gunakan pintasan Cmd+K.
3. Ketikkan pesan ke Copilot yang meminta respons terstruktur dengan sub-heading H1, H2, atau H3 (contoh: 'Tulis ringkasan singkat dengan heading H1, H2, dan H3' atau perhatikan teks berformat '###').
4. Amati respons asisten AI: baris dengan penanda '# ', '## ', atau '### ' sekarang dirender bersih secara otomatis sebagai judul/sub-judul tebal dengan skala ukuran font (H1 = 17pt, H2 = 15pt, H3 = 13.5pt) dengan spasi vertikal yang rapi tanpa menyertakan prefiks tag mentah lagi.

title: Make Copilot mutation detection less sensitive
description: User reported that the copilot is too sensitive and often interprets conversational prompts (like asking to create an issue or discussing solutions) as mutation requests, triggering the action plan UI and blocking consultation. Need to refine 'looksLikeMutationRequest' to ignore questions/consultations.

notes:
[Lokasi UI]
Laci detail issue di sisi kanan layar (Issue Detail Panel / Right Pane), khususnya komponen kotak input teks multi-baris (NSTextView) untuk deskripsi atau komentar.

[Panduan Pengujian Manual]
1. Jalankan aplikasi Workstation.
2. Klik salah satu issue di papan kanban untuk membuka laci detail di sisi kanan.
3. Lakukan interaksi seperti mengedit deskripsi issue atau menambahkan komentar.
4. Input teks akan menyesuaikan tingginya secara dinamis sesuai teks yang diketik tanpa terjadi kegagalan/crash.

title: Add new feature to Settings section in Beads Kanban app
description: Introduce a new feature within the app's Settings section to allow users to configure additional preferences or behaviour. The exact functionality is to be defined, but this issue covers the end-to-end addition: UI component, data binding, persistence, and integration with existing settings.
design: 1. Determine the placement of the new feature in the existing settings layout. 2. Create the necessary UI component (e.g., toggle, slider, text input). 3. Connect the component to the state management (context / store) and to the persistence layer (local storage or backend API if required). 4. Update any settings models or schemas to support the new field. 5. Add unit / integration tests. 6. Update the changelog and documentation if needed.
acceptance_criteria:
The new feature is present in the Settings section with appropriate labelling.
User can interact with the feature (e.g., toggle, select, input) and the interaction is reflected immediately.
The setting value persists across page reloads and app restarts.
Existing settings continue to work without regression.
Any relevant validation or error handling is in place.
notes:
Implemented: new \"Board\" tab di Settings, dengan \"Compact card layout\" toggle.

Lokasi di UI:

2. Jalankan `./run-app run` atau buka dari DerivedData

title: [bug] [Copilot] Fix overly sensitive interactive action card triggers
description: The Copilot intent router triggers the JSON WorkflowPlan / interactive action card too easily on generic keywords (like 'ready', 'buat', etc.) and shows unusable Proceed/Cancel cards when no actual actions are parsed. Refine the intent detection and gracefully degrade empty/skip action plans to normal text messages.
close_reason: Implemented refined intent router checks and graceful fallback degradation to regular text messages for empty plan results.

title: \[Copilot\] Add system prompt customization under Preferences
description: Allow users to edit or select custom System Prompts for the Copilot directly from the settings panel, letting them customize the AI's tone, framework versions, or coding styles.
notes:
### Lokasi Elemen Baru/Berubah di UI
- Berada di panel **Settings** (ikon roda gigi di pojok kiri bawah sidebar utama) pada tab **Local AI** (dengan ikon cpu).
- Terdapat seksi baru bernama **"Copilot System Prompt"** lengkap dengan ikon sparkles/bintang.
- Seksi ini menyediakan sebuah area editor teks multi-baris (`TextEditor`) monospaced, di mana pengguna dapat mengedit/menulis instruksi sistem kustom sesuka hati.
- Di bagian bawah area editor tersebut, terdapat baris pintasan **"Presets"** yang memungkinkan pengguna memuat template instruksi sistem dengan sekali klik:
  - **Standard**: Mengosongkan kustomisasi untuk kembali menggunakan system prompt bawaan Beads.
  - **Concise Developer**: Menginstruksikan AI menjadi pengembang senior yang menjawab secara sangat ringkas dan langsung ke kode solusi Swift tanpa basa-basi.
  - **Detailed Mentor**: Menginstruksikan AI bertindak sebagai mentor pemrograman yang ramah, memberikan penjelasan detail langkah demi langkah, dan menyarankan praktik terbaik.

### Panduan Pengujian Manual Langkah Demi Langkah
1. **Buka Pengaturan**: Jalankan aplikasi Workstation, lalu klik ikon roda gigi (**Settings**) di pojok kiri bawah sidebar utama untuk membuka panel pengaturan.
2. **Pilih Tab Local AI**: Klik tab **Local AI** di sidebar panel pengaturan.
3. **Temukan Seksi Baru**: Gulir ke bawah hingga Anda melihat seksi **"Copilot System Prompt"**.
4. **Uji Coba Presets**: Klik tombol preset **"Concise Developer"**. Perhatikan bahwa area teks editor langsung terisi dengan instruksi pengembang ringkas.
5. **Simpan Otomatis**: Ketikkan atau edit teks tersebut secara manual untuk memverifikasi penyimpanan kustomisasi secara langsung.
6. **Buka Copilot**: Tutup panel Settings, lalu buka panel chat **Copilot** di sebelah kanan (gunakan tombol Copilot di toolbar atau pintasan `Cmd+K`).
7. **Kirim Pertanyaan**: Kirimkan pertanyaan pemrograman, misalnya: *"Bagaimana cara membuat Singleton di Swift?"*.
8. **Verifikasi Respon Ringkas**: Verifikasi bahwa respon Copilot langsung menyajikan kode Singleton Swift secara padat dan tanpa teks basa-basi pembuka/penutup, sesuai system prompt kustom pengembang ringkas.
9. **Kembalikan ke Default**: Kembali ke **Settings -> Local AI** dan klik preset **"Standard"** untuk mengosongkan kustomisasi dan kembali ke system prompt bawaan.

title: \[Copilot\] Gracefully handle network offline states with retry actions
description: When the network connection to the local AI or external LLM fails, show a beautiful offline state interactive card in the chat bubble featuring a 'Retry' button rather than a raw, hard-to-read error message.
notes:
### Lokasi Elemen Baru/Berubah di UI
- Berada di **Panel Kanan (Detail Pane)** pada tab **Copilot** (yang memiliki ikon sparkles/bintang).
- Ketika koneksi jaringan ke AI lokal atau LLM eksternal terputus atau offline, gelembung pesan error biasa kini digantikan oleh sebuah **Offline Error Card** premium yang sesuai dengan Style Guide.
- Kartu ini menampilkan ikon `wifi.slash` berwarna merah dan pesan ramah pengguna "Network Connection Offline".
- Terdapat bagian detail teknis kesalahan yang dapat dilipat/diekspansi dengan mengklik tombol kolaps **"Show Technical Details"** lengkap dengan animasi transisi chevron (`chevron.right` ke `chevron.down`).
- Di bagian kanan bawah kartu error tersebut, terdapat tombol **"Retry Connection"** berwarna emas premium (menggunakan style `WorkstationPrimaryButtonStyle`).
- Tombol "Retry Connection" ini ketika diklik akan menghapus kartu error tersebut dan secara otomatis memicu pengulangan regenerasi pesan Copilot yang terakhir dikirim.

### Panduan Pengujian Manual Langkah Demi Langkah
1. **Jalankan Aplikasi**: Jalankan aplikasi Workstation.
2. **Buka Copilot**: Buka panel Copilot di sebelah kanan (bisa dengan klik ikon Copilot di toolbar atau pintasan `Cmd+K`).
3. **Simulasikan Offline**: Matikan koneksi internet Anda atau hentikan server model AI lokal Anda agar layanan AI tidak dapat dihubungi.
4. **Kirim Pesan**: Ketikkan pesan atau pertanyaan di kolom input chat Copilot lalu kirimkan.
5. **Amati Error Card**: Tunggu sejenak hingga sistem mendeteksi kegagalan jaringan atau server tidak terjangkau. Perhatikan bahwa alih-alih menampilkan teks error mentah yang tidak ramah, sistem akan menampilkan kartu **Offline Error Card** berwarna merah lembut dengan ikon `wifi.slash`.
6. **Ekspansi Detail Teknis**: Klik tulisan **"Show Technical Details"** untuk mengekspansi detail kesalahan teknis jaringan. Klik lagi untuk menyembunyikannya.
7. **Simulasikan Online Kembali**: Nyalakan kembali koneksi internet atau hidupkan kembali server model AI lokal Anda.
8. **Uji Coba Pengulangan (Retry)**: Klik tombol **"Retry Connection"** di bagian bawah kartu error tersebut.
9. **Verifikasi**: Verifikasi bahwa kartu error tersebut hilang dan Copilot secara otomatis mencoba mengirim ulang pesan terakhir untuk menghasilkan respons baru dari model AI.

title: \[Copilot\] Support persistent chat history across sessions
description: Add persistent chat history saving to SQLite or JSON database so users can view past conversation trees and continue old conversations when restarting the application or switching between issues.
notes:
### Lokasi Elemen Baru/Berubah di UI
- Obrolan Copilot secara otomatis disimpan secara persisten di balik layar ke dalam berkas JSON (`copilot-transcripts.json`) di direktori Application Support pengguna.
- Riwayat obrolan dipisahkan secara rapi per Issue ID yang sedang aktif (atau berlabel "global" jika tidak ada issue yang dipilih).
- Di **Panel Kanan (Detail Pane)** pada tab **Copilot** di bagian pojok kanan atas header, terdapat tombol **"Clear Chat"** baru dengan ikon tempat sampah (`trash`). Tombol ini hanya muncul ketika sudah ada pesan di dalam chat obrolan.
- Mengklik tombol tempat sampah tersebut akan menghapus riwayat obrolan untuk issue yang aktif secara permanen baik dari UI maupun dari berkas penyimpanan persisten.

### Panduan Pengujian Manual Langkah Demi Langkah
1. **Kirim Pesan Pertama**: Jalankan aplikasi Workstation, buka panel Copilot, lalu pilih salah satu issue dari papan Kanban (misalnya `Workstation-m1d`). Kirim beberapa pesan obrolan di panel Copilot.
2. **Uji Coba Perpindahan Issue**: Pilih issue yang berbeda (misalnya `Workstation-zj7`) atau hapus pilihan issue. Perhatikan bahwa obrolan di panel Copilot akan kosong atau menampilkan obrolan dari issue yang baru Anda pilih.
3. **Kembali ke Issue Pertama**: Kembali pilih issue pertama (`Workstation-m1d`). Verifikasi bahwa riwayat percakapan Anda sebelumnya dimuat kembali dengan sempurna.
4. **Uji Coba Restart Aplikasi**: Restart/Tutup aplikasi Workstation secara keseluruhan, lalu jalankan kembali.
5. **Verifikasi Setelah Restart**: Buka kembali panel Copilot dan pilih issue `Workstation-m1d`. Verifikasi bahwa riwayat percakapan Anda tetap ada dan tidak hilang setelah aplikasi di-restart.
6. **Uji Coba Hapus Obrolan (Clear Chat)**: Klik tombol **"Clear Chat"** (ikon tempat sampah `trash`) di pojok kanan atas header Copilot.
7. **Verifikasi Hapus**: Verifikasi bahwa seluruh pesan obrolan terhapus secara instan dari layar dan tombol tempat sampah tersebut hilang dari header karena chat sudah kosong.

title: Support Interactive Copilot Action Execution for Issue Mutations
description:
Introduce an 'Active Agent' capability to the Workflow Copilot Pane. When a user asks Copilot to perform mutations on selected issues (e.g., 'please close these issues', 'translate these issues to Indonesian', 'change priorities to P1', 'assign to me'), Copilot should generate an interactive proposal card instead of a plain text response.

Proposed UX Flow & Features:
1. Intent Recognition: Expand the Copilot reasoning flow to recognize command prompts targeting the selected issues.
2. Interactive Proposal Cards: Render a custom proposal card in the chat history stream listing the planned changes (e.g. showing a preview of the close reason or translated titles/descriptions).
3. Action Confirmation: Embed 'Confirm & Execute' and 'Cancel' buttons in the proposal card. Confirming triggers the mutations in the IssueStore in real-time, automatically updating the board.
acceptance_criteria:
1. Copilot interprets issue-mutation prompts and returns structured action recommendations.
2. Recommendations are shown as an interactive proposal card in the message feed.
3. The proposal card has a text field/preview of changes, alongside 'Confirm & Execute' and 'Cancel' buttons.
4. Confirming mutates the selected issues in the Store and refreshes the Board view.
5. Build succeeds and tests pass.
notes:
Implementasi selesai. Berikut ringkasan perubahan:

## File Baru
- `Sources/BeadsContract/WorkflowPlan.swift` — Model data untuk WorkflowPlan, WorkflowAction, WorkflowActionKind. Menyediakan parser JSON dari raw LLM response.
- `Tests/BeadsContractTests/WorkflowPlanTests.swift` — 11 test untuk WorkflowPlan parsing, CodingKeys, dan displayLabel.

## File Diubah
- `Sources/BeadsWorkspace/LocalAIAction.swift` — Tambah case `.copilotPlan(prompt:contextIssues:)` dengan prompt template yang meminta LLM mengembalikan JSON plan.
- `Sources/BeadsWorkspace/UpdateIssueInput.swift` — Tambah field `notes` dan `labels` (var, bukan let) supaya bisa di-assign saat copilot apply plan.
- `Sources/BeadsWorkspace/BeadsService.swift` — Extend updateIssue untuk support notes (--notes) dan labels (--labels).
- `App/IssueRightPane.swift` — WorkflowCopilotPane: 
  - Tambah mutation request detection (looksLikeMutationRequest) yang routing ke copilotPlan instead of plain copilot.
  - Tambah proposal card section dengan checkbox per action, warning banner, dan tombol Confirm/Discard.
  - Tambah applyPlan() dan executeAction() untuk assign, assignAndLaunch, closeWithReason, requestReview, updateField.

## Cara Testing Manual
1. Buka app, masukkan workspace yang punya issues.
2. Pilih 1-3 issue di board (click + shift-click untuk multi-select).
3. Tekan Cmd+K atau klik tombol Copilot di toolbar — panel kanan berubah ke Workflow Copilot.
4. Ketik prompt mutation seperti "assign to me", "close these issues", "change priority to P1", atau "request review".
5. Copilot mendeteksi mutation request → kirim ke copilotPlan → parse JSON plan → tampilkan proposal card.
6. Checklist/uncheck actions yang ingin di-apply, lihat warning jika ada.
7. Klik "Confirm N Actions" untuk execute semua checked mutations → board refresh otomatis.
8. Alternatif: ketik "summarize backlog" atau pertanyaan read-only → copilot tetap reply sebagai plain text bubble (tidak menampilkan proposal card).

## Acceptance Criteria
✓ Copilot interprets issue-mutation prompts and returns structured action recommendations
✓ Recommendations are shown as an interactive proposal card in the message feed  
✓ Proposal card has checkboxes, preview of changes, and Confirm/Cancel buttons
✓ Confirming mutates selected issues in the Store and refreshes the Board view
✓ Build succeeds and tests pass (314 tests, 36 suites)

title: Recover agent launch when worktree already exists
description:
Why: Assign + launch agent can leave a deterministic worktree/branch behind when Terminal fails to open, causing the next assignment to show a blocking attention sheet instead of relaunching.
What:
- Treat matching same-issue agent worktree/branch as reusable.
- Relaunch Terminal from the existing worktree instead of trying git worktree add again.
- Add explicit cleanup action for stale worktree/branch recovery.
Out of scope:
- Automatically deleting existing agent worktrees.
- Changing executor CLI templates.
notes: Implemented recoverable agent worktree launch. Matching existing same-issue worktrees are reusable, assign+launch skips git worktree add and reopens Terminal there, explicit Clean Up & Retry removes stale worktree/branch, and agent takeover clears the human review label after claim. Also restored missing Xcode inputs in this worktree (workstation_logo.png, IssueDraft.swift) and fixed the CreateIssueSheet call mismatch so app build passes. Validation: swift test passed 268/268; xcodebuild -project Workstation.xcodeproj -scheme Workstation -configuration Debug build SUCCEEDED.
close_reason: Fixed: folder+branch now detected as reusable worktree (not blocked). Added cleanupOrphanWorktree() for stale cases. UI shows blue 'Existing worktree found' card with Launch/Cleanup actions. 301 tests pass, build succeeds.

title: Agent Profiles & Assignment: Add Gemini Brand with Custom Logo support
description:
Improve the Manage Agent profiles and issue Assignment by introducing the 6 core developer AI brands shown in the reference image as first-class members.

### 📦 1. Core Agent Brands
- **Claude** (Anthropic - Wavy Logo)
- **Kimi** (Moonshot AI - "K" Logo)
- **Zhipu** (Zhipu GLM - "Z" Logo)
- **Gemini** (Google - Sparkle/Hexagon Logo)
- **DeepSeek** (DeepSeek - Dolphin Logo)

1. **Extend AgentAvatarKind** in `AgentProfile.swift` to support: `.claude`, `.kimi`, `.zhipu`, `.gemini`, `.deepseek`, `.minimax`, `.codex`, `.other`, `.initials`.

   - Kimi: "KI" (token: "kimi")
   - Zhipu: "ZH" (token: "zhipu")
   - Gemini: "GE" (token: "gemini")
   - DeepSeek: "DS" (token: "deepseek")
   - MiniMax: "MM" (token: "minimax")

4. **Update AssigneeBadgeView.swift** to load logos from assets:
   - `claude-logo`
   - `kimi-logo`
   - `zhipu-logo`
   - `gemini-logo`
   - `deepseek-logo`
   - `minimax-logo`

notes: Implemented Gemini Brand & Custom Logo support. Extended AgentAvatarKind enum with 5 new brands: .kimi, .zhipu, .gemini, .deepseek, .minimax. Added token mappings in AssigneeAvatarResolver with aliases (e.g., 'kimi'/'moonshot' → .kimi, 'zhipu'/'glm' → .zhipu, 'gemini'/'google' → .gemini, 'deepseek'/'deep-seek' → .deepseek, 'minimax'/'mini-max' → .minimax). title: Copilot: configure API key and route all Copilot AI features
description:
Why: Copilot features need a configurable API key instead of being limited to local/default settings, so PRD import, chat, regenerate, and draft flows can share the same configured provider credentials.
What:
- Add an API key field in Local AI/Copilot settings.
- Persist the key securely enough for current app preferences conventions.
- Pass the key through LocalAIService requests.
- Use the configured key for all Copilot AI entry points.
- Surface missing/invalid key errors clearly.
Out of scope:
- Account billing UI or remote key management.
design: Extend LocalAISettings with apiKey and optional Gemini provider support if the codebase does not already have it. Keep Copilot calling AppViewModel/LocalAIService so all features share one routing path.
acceptance_criteria: User can save an API key in settings; Copilot chat uses configured key; PRD issue drafting uses configured key; regenerate uses configured key; missing key/provider errors are shown clearly; existing Ollama/local flow remains usable when no key is needed.
notes: follow-up: Added Gemini/API-key provider support for Copilot and Local AI actions. Settings now include provider-aware base URL/model defaults plus secure API key entry; LocalAIService routes all Copilot chat, PRD drafting, regenerate, and existing assisted actions through the selected provider. Gemini requests send x-goog-api-key and surface missing-key/provider errors clearly while Ollama remains keyless. Verified with swift test and xcodebuild.

title: Refine run console layout from compact detail panel
description:
Redesign the Run Console pane so it feels as clean and structured as the refined issue detail panel.

Why this exists:
The current Run Console has dense metadata and large prompt/command blocks stacked in a way that is harder to scan. It should follow the same compact dark productivity layout as issue detail.

What needs to be done:
- Rework the Run Console header and metadata into compact visual bands/cards.
- Keep status, issue title, agent, launch type, started time, worktree, and branch easy to scan.
- Organize prompt, terminal command, actions, notes, and transcript so long text blocks do not dominate the first view.
- Preserve existing copy/open terminal/status/notes/transcript behavior.
- Match WorkstationTheme and the compact task-panel reference without copying the light screenshot.

Acceptance criteria:
- Run Console looks visually aligned with the refined issue detail panel.
- Key run metadata is visible near the top.
- Prompt and terminal command remain copyable and readable.
- Open Terminal and status update flows still work.
- Layout remains usable in the narrow right pane.
notes: Implemented compact Run Console layout with top run metadata, status/launch chips, segmented Prompt/Command/Activity tabs, and preserved copy prompt, copy command, open terminal, status, notes, and transcript flows. swift test and xcodebuild passed.

title: Refine issue detail layout from compact task-panel reference
description:
Redesign the issue detail panel layout using the provided compact task-panel reference as inspiration while preserving Workstation's dark theme and existing workflows.

Why this exists:
The current issue detail panel has grown feature-heavy and some important metadata/actions require scanning or scrolling. The referenced layout is easier to read because it groups title, badges, progress/status metadata, description, and discussion-like sections into clear visual bands.

What needs to be done:
- Rework issue detail visual hierarchy so title, state, difficulty/type, assignee, updated, worktree, and recurring indicators are immediately scannable near the top.
- Use compact rows/cards inspired by the reference, adapted to the existing dark Workstation palette and SwiftUI component vocabulary.
- Consider a tabbed or segmented lower area for description/details/activity-like sections if it reduces vertical sprawl.
- Keep existing issue actions, recurring controls, dependency controls, local AI summary, and latest run details accessible without losing behavior.
- Preserve current Beads data contracts and avoid unrelated refactors.

Acceptance criteria:
- Issue detail feels cleaner and more structured, with key metadata visible without excessive scrolling.
- Worktree and recurring status remain prominent near the top.
- Existing interactions still work: close, claim, review, send back, dependency add/remove, recurring run complete, local AI summary, copy/open console.
- Layout does not break on narrower detail panes.
- Visual style matches WorkstationTheme rather than copying the light screenshot verbatim.
notes: Implemented compact issue detail layout with top metadata, prominent worktree/recurring indicators, and segmented Details/Activity/Actions sections. swift test and xcodebuild passed.

notes:

2. applyCopilotPlan (AppViewModel): refactored to a single exhaustive switch loop covering ALL ActionKind cases:

   - updateField: maps action.field ('description'/'desc'/'notes'/'priority') to UpdateIssueInput fields, calls store.update; priority is Int-parsed from fieldValue string

title: Apply loop: route approved actions via existing launch methods (assign_and_launch only)
description: Sequential apply loop di AppViewModel.applyCopilotPlan(). Setiap approved ProposedAction.assign_and_launch → assignAndLaunchIfExecutor. Stop on error, surface partial state. Re-validate sebelum apply. v1 hanya cover assign_and_launch (PRD Fase 1).
acceptance_criteria: Pilih 3 issue → 'assign claude' → plan muncul → apply → 3 worktree terbuka dengan dirty-git sheet preserved. Action lain di-skip dengan tanda 'not supported in v1'.
notes:
Implementation complete on agent/workstation-cnl branch.

What was built:
1. WorkflowPlan + ProposedAction types (BeadsContract/WorkflowCopilot/WorkflowPlan.swift) — struct-based with ActionKind enum, fault-tolerant JSON decode (unknown kinds fall back to .skip).
2. WorkflowPlanParser (BeadsWorkspace/WorkflowCopilot/WorkflowPlanParser.swift) — parse() + parseStripping() to handle markdown-fenced LLM output.

AC status: Pilih 3 issue → 'assign claude' → plan muncul → apply → 3 worktree terbuka ✓ (dirty-git sheet preserved via existing beginWorktreeAgentLaunch preflight). Action lain di-skip dengan tanda 'not supported in v1' ✓.

title: Implement WorkflowCopilotRouter (intent classification + dispatch)
description: Heuristic-first intent detection (keyword 'assign', 'launch', 'close', 'create issue', 'translate', 'analyze backlog'). Fallback LLM classify untuk ambigu. Dispatch ke LocalAIAction yang sesuai (existing untuk tier 1, copilotPlan untuk tier 2).
acceptance_criteria: WorkflowCopilotRouter.swift. Test heuristic match untuk semua keyword. Fallback path tested dengan stub LocalAIService. swift test hijau.
notes:
follow-up: Addressed two reviewer bugs.

1. 'could not reach ollama' — routeWithFallback was async throws and propagated LLM classification errors. Changed to async -> LocalAIAction (non-throwing): any Ollama/settings error during classification is caught and falls back to .copilot. Test renamed from 'propagatesErrors' to 'swallowsLLMErrors' and now asserts .copilot is returned.

2. 'close gives tutorial' — root cause was two problems stacked: (a) the copilot pane hardcoded .copilot for every request so the router was never called; (b) even if the router had been called, 'close' mapped to .copilotPlan which generates JSON that looks like a tutorial.
Fix: wired WorkflowCopilotRouter().route() into IssueRightPane.sendPrompt(). Rerouted 'close' with exactly 1 context issue → .closeReason(issue:summary:"") for a clean draft; 0 or multiple issues keep .copilotPlan for the multi-issue approval flow.

286 tests green.

title: Implement WorkflowCopilotStore (@Observable conversation + plan state)
description: @MainActor @Observable store: messages[], pendingPlan, isGenerating, lastError, approvedActionIDs. Method submit(userPrompt) → route via heuristic/LLM → render. Method applyApproved() sequential. In-memory only (no disk persist v1).
acceptance_criteria: WorkflowCopilotStore.swift di BeadsWorkspace. State transition test sesuai PRD 5.4. swift test hijau.
notes: Implemented WorkflowCopilotStore.swift in BeadsWorkspace/WorkflowCopilot/. Also added the foundation files this branch lacked from dependency branches: WorkflowPlan.swift + WorkflowIntent.swift in BeadsContract, WorkflowPlanParser.swift + WorkflowPlanValidator.swift in BeadsWorkspace. title: Add WorkflowPlan JSON parser with fixture tests

title: Fix: AI assignee logos kept reverting after xcodegen generate
description:
Bug: PNG icons di assets/ (claude-logo, codex_logo, robot_logo) tidak masuk app bundle setelah xcodegen regenerate pbxproj. Bundle.main.url(forResource:) return nil → AssigneeBadgeView fallback ke SF Symbol (sparkles/cpu.fill/etc) instead of branded logos. Root cause: assets/ tidak terdaftar di project.yml sources, jadi setiap xcodegen generate, pbxproj dibuat tanpa resources tersebut.

Fix: tambah 'assets' di project.yml sources dengan buildPhase: resources. PNG sekarang di-copy ke .app/Contents/Resources/ di root (bukan subfolder), jadi lookup Bundle.main.url(forResource:) cocok dengan nama file.
notes: Fixed via project.yml — assets/ ditambahkan sebagai resources buildPhase (tanpa type: folder supaya tiap PNG masuk Resources/ root, bukan Resources/assets/). Build verified: claude-logo.png, codex_logo.png, robot_logo.png present di .app/Contents/Resources/. Regression-proof: setiap xcodegen generate akan re-add resources ini.

title: Worktree Visibility: show active worktree badge in UI
description:
Add a compact worktree indicator to kanban cards and issue detail so parallel work is obvious at a glance.

Why this exists:
Users need to quickly tell which issues are currently running in a worktree without confusing that state with blocked or review status.

What needs to be done:
- Add a small worktree badge or icon on issue cards when a worktree is active or queued.
- Show worktree path or branch in detail view where it fits.
- Keep the indicator visually distinct from blocked, priority, and review badges.
- Avoid layout breakage on narrow cards.

Acceptance criteria:
- Active worktree issues are visibly marked in the kanban board.
- Issue detail shows the worktree path or branch when available.
- Badge remains compact and does not wrap awkwardly.
- Non-worktree issues are unchanged.
notes: follow-up: Moved the worktree indicator into the issue detail metadata area directly below Updated with a folder/worktree icon and branch label; moved the recurring controls section up directly after properties so recurring actions are visible without scrolling. Tests and Debug build passed.

title: Worktree Metadata: persist path, branch, and launch state
description:
Persist worktree-specific launch metadata so agent runs stay understandable after restart.

Why this exists:
The app needs a durable record of which branch, path, and state belong to each agent run so UI and review flows can recover cleanly.

What needs to be done:
- Store worktree path, branch name, launch status, and source run linkage in local run metadata.
- Keep the data available after app restart.
- Expose the metadata to console and issue views that need it.
- Keep the implementation local-first and do not edit .beads files directly.

Acceptance criteria:
- Worktree path and branch survive app restart.
- Agent run history can restore the worktree association.
- UI can read the stored metadata without guessing.
- Existing non-worktree runs still behave normally.
notes: Persisted worktree metadata on AgentRunRecord and threaded it through launch history/coordinators. Launches now carry worktree path, branch name, and optional source run linkage; terminal reopening uses the worktree path when present. Console and issue detail now surface the active worktree metadata, and tests cover persistence plus launch-session restoration. Issue left open for human review as requested.

title: Multi-select issue di kanban board untuk bulk action
description:
User mau bisa pilih beberapa issue sekaligus dan jalanin bulk action (close, claim, label, dst) tanpa harus klik satu-satu.

**Use case:**
- Pas selesai sprint, close 5 issue P3 sekaligus
- Tag 'human' ke 10 issue review sekaligus
- Claim batch ready issue ke satu assignee
- Hapus label dari banyak issue sekaligus

**Selection model (proposal):**
- Click → single select (existing)
- Cmd-click → toggle add/remove individual
- Shift-click → range select dalam kolom
- Esc → clear selection
- Cross-column selection allowed

**Bulk actions toolbar (proposal v1):**
- Muncul di atas board saat >=2 issue selected
- Tombol: Claim, Close, Mark Human Review, Clear Selection, dst
- Count badge: 'N selected'

**Visual:**
- Selected card: accent gold border + subtle background tint
- Non-selected dim sedikit saat ada selection aktif

**Out of scope v1 (defer ke follow-up):**
- Drag-rectangle selection
- Keyboard shortcuts (cmd-A select all, dst)
- Multi-select di list view (kalau ada)
- Bulk drag-drop antar kolom

**Tech approach:**
- selectedIssueIDs: Set<String> di AppViewModel atau IssueStore
- Tap gesture diperluas dengan modifier flag detection (NSEvent.modifierFlags) atau via SwiftUI Environment
- Bulk action handlers di AppViewModel (loop ke existing single-issue methods)
- IssueDetailView panel hide saat multi-select aktif (>=2), replaced dengan bulk action panel
notes: Implemented v1 multi-select on kanban: Cmd-click toggles, Shift-click range within column, Esc clears. Visual selection via existing isSelected styling. Right pane swaps to BulkActionPanel when >=2 selected (Claim All / Mark Human Review / Close All with shared reason sheet / Clear). swift test 246/246 green. xcodebuild Debug succeeded. Manual smoke test pending.

title: Refactoring sweep berkala
description: Recurring task untuk audit + refactor kode yang menumpuk: dead code, function panjang, duplikasi, naming inkonsisten, file >300 baris, deprecation warning. Dilakukan tiap 30 hari. Tujuan: jaga health codebase tanpa nunggu jadi bug.

**Applied refactor:**
- Extract IssueDetailRecurringSection.swift (238 baris) dari IssueDetailView.swift
- IssueDetailView.swift turun dari 813 → 593 baris (-220, -27%)
- Pure view extraction, zero perubahan business logic / behavior / styling

- ./run-app build → BUILD SUCCEEDED
